title: Formations Overworld
description: Formations Overworld adds plenty of new structures to the overworld!
body:
![Formations Overworld Banner](https://imgur.com/qjonte2.png)
### **Formations Overworld** adds a bunch of new structures to the various overworld biomes!


![Separator](https://imgur.com/yl2Gq3d.png) ## Structures Some examples of the structure you can find in Formations Overworld. For more images, you can check the image gallery.

![Separator](https://imgur.com/ksGhYpe.png) ## FAQ **Can I use your mod in my modpack?** Yes, feel free to use my mod in your modpack ![Separator](https://imgur.com/iLGGqDH.png) ## Discord For future content, upcoming mods, and discussion, feel free to join the SuperMartijn642 discord server! [](https://discord.gg/QEbGyUYB2e) ![Separator](https://imgur.com/M8GKFFk.png)
